  "reasoning": "The state demonstrated immense capacity by unilaterally emancipating the serfs and crushing the Polish revolt, boosting its power. However, the creation of local self-government (Zemstvos) and an independent judiciary provided the first significant institutional foundation for civil society, increasing its power from a near-zero base.",
